use_cases: Display file upload or download progress in applications
Show task completion percentage for workflows and onboarding
Indicate loading or buffering states during async operations
Present skill levels or proficiency metrics in profiles
Visualize data processing or analytics completion rates
ai_summary: A minimal progress indicator component with both linear bar and circular progress variants, built on Radix UI primitives. Supports customizable sizes, stroke widths, and styling through className props for flexible integration into any application requiring progress visualization.
